name: geekhoo-plugins
description: Marketplace for personal Claude Code plugins focused on DevExtreme web UI workflows and semantic design-system token operations.

plugins.name: dx-webdev
plugins.description: DevExtreme jQuery web development helpers for pure HTML/JS/CSS apps, incl. the ProgramsV2 grid updater.

plugins.name: semantic-design-system
plugins.description: Skills, agents, hooks, and MCP tools for generating and applying semantic design token systems.

plugins.name: geeky-orchestration
plugins.description: End-to-end feature delivery with an intelligent geeky-orchestrator, portable agent projections, lifecycle skills, deterministic quality gates, and frozen-artifact guards.

plugins.name: dev-workflows
plugins.description: Composable workflow skills distilled from cross-project sessions: planning/spec, workflow routing, review/audit, testing/QA, browser/Figma, env/setup/deploy, git, corpus and document pipelines, capability inventory, operational stabilization, session/friction analysis, an env-doctor toolchain check, and memory/status utilities. Ships a portable SessionStart env-canary hook. Windows-aware.
